docket_entries.description: ORDER FOR DISMISSAL W/O PREJUDICE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,600.00 FILED BY NYKON, MYKHAILO AS TO DEFENDANT KAIWI GENERAL CONTRACTOR, A CORPORATION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-28-2025 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE BY JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID FLEISIG. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF MYKHAILO NYKON IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT KAIWI GENERAL CONTRACTOR. A CORPORATION IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
